Executive Summary

This report presents the vertical accuracy assessment of the LiDAR-derived digital elevation model using 19 ground control points. The Root Mean Square Error in Z (RMSz) was calculated to be 0.0753 US Survey Feet. This is equivalent to 0.0229 meters for standards compliance.

Note: All measurements were performed in US Survey Feet. Metric equivalents are provided for compliance with industry standards that typically report in meters. Conversion factor: 1 US Survey Feet = 0.3048006096 meters.

Notes

  • Outliers are detected using z-score method with threshold of 3.0 standard deviations
  • Outliers are highlighted in red and excluded from statistical calculations
  • RMSz is calculated as: √(Σ(differences²)/n) where n is the number of valid points used
  • Positive differences indicate the raster elevation is higher than the GCP elevation
  • Coordinate System: EPSG:6479
  • All measurements in: US Survey Feet
  • Metric conversion: 1 US Survey Feet = 0.3048006096 meters
